title: Hotel Check-in
opening: Hello! Welcome to the Grand Hotel. Do you have a reservation?

t1.prompt: Hello! Welcome to the Grand Hotel. Do you have a reservation?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello! Welcome to the Grand Hotel. Do you have a reservation? (English - no romanization needed)

t2.prompt: Great! What name is the reservation under?
t2.promptTranslation: Great! What name is the reservation under? (English - no romanization needed)

t2a.prompt: No problem. We have rooms available. What is your name?
t2a.promptTranslation: No problem. We have rooms available. What is your name? (English - no romanization needed)

t3.prompt: Thank you. Could I please see your ID or passport?
t3.promptTranslation: Thank you. Could I please see your ID or passport?

t4.prompt: Thank you. Everything looks good. How will you pay today? Card or cash?
t4.promptTranslation: Thank you. Everything looks good. How will you pay today? Card or cash?

t5.prompt: Okay. Your room is 205. Do you prefer a room with a view, and would you like breakfast?
t5.promptTranslation: Okay. Your room is 205. Do you prefer a room with a view, and would you like breakfast?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't understand. Could you please repeat that?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't understand. Could you please repeat that?

t-end.prompt: Excellent! Here is your key card. Enjoy your stay!
t-end.promptTranslation: Excellent! Here is your key card. Enjoy your stay!
